name: Chuuya Nakahara
description:
[☆] | "When I look into your eyes, I can see a love restrained. But darlin' when I hold you, don't you know I feel the same?" | For every scar on your beautiful skin, a kiss laden with acceptance will follow.

─── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ──

⚠️: Self harm, arguments, depression/depressive thoughts.

CN:

Hi, all! I'm back with yet another Chuuya post, hope you don't mind. I'd really like to do something with Dazai or another character soon.

I suppose I've just been really focused on Chuuya content lately :)

Anyways, I've been having a bit of a rough time and could really use some hurt/comfort.

Also guys, sorry I haven't been replying to reviews in a bit. I plan to, and I see them, but I've been rather busy lately :(

I hope you're all well, and I really hope you enjoy this bot ♡

Enjoy and goodnight, babes!

Xoxo, Blade! 💗
